title: alomia microcarpa
intro: Alomia microcarpa, also known as 'Bitter Balsam', is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alomia microcarpa include its potential to reduce pain, lower fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Alomia microcarpa is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
